summary: Frontend-only regression for iter-114 (Triangle base/height/apexShift, MeshFilletDialog UI, RightPanel refactor). All visible UI flows pass. Mesh Fillet dialog tested via static code review only (no STL fixture spawned).
critical_code_review_comments: RightPanel.jsx still ~1300 lines after the iter-114 extraction; PRD goal of 'splitting ~1500 line files' partially met. ProfileSection (printer/filament/community picker, ~250 lines) and the Inspector dimension switchboard remain inline candidates for a future pass.

Spec wording bug (non-blocking): the test instruction's formula `max(base, base/2 + apexShift + base/2)` overstates the actual triangle bbox width. The geometry's bbox is `max(base/2, apexShift) - min(-base/2, apexShift)`, which with base=60/apexShift=15 = 60 (NOT 75). Observed W=60 is geometrically correct; recommend updating the test rubric.

MeshFilletDialog: long Manifold Minkowski (10-60 s) blocks main thread; AbortController is wired but `applyMeshFillet` must honour `signal` cooperatively for cancel to be responsive. Verify in next iteration with a real STL.

MeshImportTools is rendered only when `obj.geometry` truthy; for imported objects whose geometry failed to deserialise from a saved project, Repair/Fillet buttons silently disappear. Consider a friendly placeholder.

test_results.triangle_add: PASS — add-primitive-triangle creates triangle, Inspector shows shape2d-controls
test_results.triangle_dims: PASS — dim-tri-base=30, dim-tri-height=26, dim-tri-apex-shift=0; helper text 'isoceles · +half base = right triangle' visible
test_results.triangle_apex: PASS — apex 0→15 keeps height=26; W stayed at 60 (geometrically correct because |apex|=15 < base/2=30 so apex doesn't widen the bbox)
test_results.extrude_presets: PASS — extrude-preset-1 and extrude-preset-5 present on Triangle
test_results.workplane_ruler: PASS — workplane-ruler-toggle-btn present, not disabled, clickable
test_results.place_on_face: PASS — place-on-face-toggle-btn present, not disabled, place-on-face-hint banner appears after click
test_results.mesh_fillet_dialog: SKIPPED (no STL fixture) — static code review of MeshFilletDialog.jsx confirms all required testids (mesh-fillet-mode-round/chamfer, mesh-fillet-scope-outer/inner/full, mesh-fillet-radius-slider, mesh-fillet-run-btn, mesh-fillet-cancel-btn), AbortController wiring, and graceful close. MeshImportTools.jsx exposes the fillet-mesh-btn next to repair-mesh-btn for imported objects.

test_credentials: session_token=st_iter114_1782699840835 (Steve Shurts, super-admin) — used via cookie injection, accepted
seed_data_creation: None — added 4 transient primitives (triangle/cube/cylinder/sphere) into a fresh /workspace session; no persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workspace is reached via /workspace (NOT /). The Add menu is opened via a button with title attribute containing 'Add' (no direct data-testid on the menu trigger — adding `data-testid=add-shape-menu` to that toolbar button would simplify future automation). Triangle Inspector controls render under data-testid='shape2d-controls' with the three new fields dim-tri-base, dim-tri-height, dim-tri-apex-shift. Apex bbox-width semantics: width = max(base/2, apexShift) - min(-base/2, apexShift), so apex within ±base/2 leaves W=base. MeshFilletDialog cannot be opened without an imported mesh; the dialog itself is wired via MeshImportTools rendered inside Inspector when obj.type==='imported' && obj.geometry.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found in scope
